introSection: Tiger Express is a Mack Rides Wild Mouse roller coaster located at Mer de Sable in Ermenonville, Hauts-de-France, France.

sections.title: History
sections.content: The ride first opened in 2000 at Six Flags Holland in Biddinghuizen, Flevoland, Netherlands as Flying Dutchman Gold Mine. It closed at the end of the 2010 season and was sold and sent to Mer de Sable in Ermenonville, Hauts-de-France, France as Tiger Express. Tiger Express opened on 26 June 2011.

fullText:
Tiger Express is a Mack Rides Wild Mouse roller coaster located at Mer de Sable in Ermenonville, Hauts-de-France, France.

The ride first opened in 2000 at Six Flags Holland in Biddinghuizen, Flevoland, Netherlands as Flying Dutchman Gold Mine. It closed at the end of the 2010 season and was sold and sent to Mer de Sable in Ermenonville, Hauts-de-France, France as Tiger Express. Tiger Express opened on 26 June 2011.





Bordeaux track and supports.

Yellow track and turquoise supports.
